creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
the source tarball dedit_0.5.10.tar.gz seems to be no longer
available on the mastersite. I found 0.6.0 at the given location
and 0.5.9 under the stable branch. But no 0.5.10.

Fix: 

Either an upgrade of the port to the 0.6.0 release. Or another 
mastersite who carries the 0.5.10 release.
How-To-Repeat: Try a make fetch without the file in /usr/ports/distfiles.
